name: python-cli-apps
description: Design, failure-contract, and test workflows for reliable Python command-line applications.

interface.shortDescription: Design and test reliable Python command-line interfaces.
interface.longDescription: Design, failure-contract, and test workflows for reliable Python command-line applications.
defaultPrompt: Use $python-cli-command-design to design a clear, stable command interface for this Python CLI.
Use $python-cli-error-output to define safe error output and exit behavior for this Python CLI.
Use $python-cli-testing to build a realistic test matrix for this Python command-line interface.
